fieldUpdates.name: AddressBookSetFirstName
AddressBookSetLastName

fieldUpdates.formula: if( !ISNEW() && Name== PRIORVALUE(Name) && ( leaseworks__First_Name__c!= PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__First_Name__c) || leaseworks__Last_Name__c!= PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Last_Name__c) ) , leaseworks__First_Name__c + IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__First_Name__c),'' ,' ') + leaseworks__Last_Name__c , Name)
fieldUpdates.name: Contact Set Name

rules.description: Not using, added code in trigger
